<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Doctrine\Inflector\Rules\NorwegianBokmal; use Doctrine\Inflector\Rules\Pattern; final class Uninflected { /** @return Pattern[] */ public static function getSingular(): iterable { yield from self::getDefault(); } /** @return Pattern[] */ public static function getPlural(): iterable { yield from self::getDefault(); } /** @return Pattern[] */ private static function getDefault(): iterable { yield new Pattern('barn'); yield new Pattern('fjell'); yield new Pattern('hus'); } }
